navigation.title: GPT Assistant
navigation.subtitle: Powered by OpenAI with MCP Tools Integration

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the interface language, chat reply language, and default slash-command prompts.

chat.emptyTitle: Start a conversation with AI assistant
chat.emptySubtitle: Ask anything and watch the AI use available tools
chat.placeholder: Type your message or / for commands... (Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.tip: Tip: The AI can use available tools to answer your questions
chat.clearHistoryConfirmMessage: This will remove all messages in this conversation. This action cannot be undone.
chat.tokenBannerLead: To use the chat, you need to set
chat.tokenBannerEnd: and enter your token in the OpenAI Configuration section.
chat.mcpBannerEnd: , enter your MCP key, and click Verify and save.
chat.tableAboveFallback: Data is shown in the table above.

table.hiddenColumnsOne: {{count}} more column hidden — ask in chat to show it
table.hiddenColumnsMany: {{count}} more columns hidden — ask in chat to show them

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure access keys for OpenAI chat and MCP server connections.
settings.openAiDescription: Enter your personal access token for the GPT proxy. It is saved locally in your browser session.
settings.mcpDescription: Enter the MCP server access key to unlock database tools in the chat. The key is verified against the server and saved locally after a successful check.
settings.mcpVerifyFailed: Failed to verify MCP access key.
settings.domainDescription: Describe table relationships and business rules for the chat assistant. Saved locally in your browser and appended to the system prompt on every message in
settings.domainDescriptionEnd: . Does not affect external MCP clients (e.g. Cursor).
settings.domainPlaceholder:
Example:
- GD_GOOD.GROUP_ID → GD_GROUP.ID (product category; GD_GROUP has PARENT_ID)
- Use GD_REMAINS.QUANTITY for stock, not GD_GOOD
settings.developerDescription: When enabled, the chat shows collapsible "Using:" panels for each tool call (SQL input, summaries, and raw results). Tables, query plans, and assistant replies are always visible.

about.title: About Us
about.projectLead: This is a demonstration Next.js application showcasing a complete
about.projectTail: implementation with universal access from multiple sources:
about.sourceServer: Server-side API routes and Server Components
about.projectFooter: The project serves as a reference implementation for integrating advanced AI capabilities via MCP into modern full-stack Next.js applications.
about.stackNext: Next.js 16 - React framework with App Router
about.stackPnpm: pnpm - Fast, disk space efficient package manager
about.getStartedDescription: Ready to explore? Configure your access keys in Settings, then try the interactive chat.
